The answer inaccurately identifies the cause of the 2013 Twilio incident as an S3 failure, when the gold answer specifies it was a Redis network partition. Additionally, it misstates the effect of retries, which the gold answer correctly attributes to the non-idempotent charge operation, not an overwhelming surge of traffic.
